"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 20:37 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except: return {}
def files(g): return [str(p) for p in sorted(Path('.').glob(g)) if p.is_file()]
route=load('governance/state/bem808_route_after_bem807.json')
rs=route.get('status','unknown')
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
resp=files('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/*')
results=files('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/*.status.json')
if rs=='next_check_runtime_after_dispatch_attempted':
    status='runtime_after_dispatch_checked_response_found' if resp else ('runtime_after_dispatch_checked_runtime_seen' if runtime.get('started_at') or runtime.get('completed_at') else 'runtime_after_dispatch_checked_missing')
    next_action='process response' if resp else ('diagnose runtime outcome' if runtime.get('started_at') or runtime.get('completed_at') else 'verify target dispatcher workflow run status / patch dispatch target')
elif rs=='next_patch_shell_loop':
    status='shell_loop_patch_still_needed'; next_action='rewrite shell loop and tick'
elif rs=='next_create_queue_item':
    status='fresh_queue_item_still_needed'; next_action='create fresh queue item and tick'
elif rs=='next_reposition_runner':
    status='runner_reposition_still_needed'; next_action='reposition processor and tick'
elif rs=='next_patch_dispatch_failed':
    status='dispatch_failed_patch_needed'; next_action='patch dispatch target workflow id/ref/permission'
elif rs=='next_fix_pat_secret_or_env':
    status='pat_env_diagnosis_needed'; next_action='verify AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT env wiring without exposing secret'
else:
    status='unknown_route_execution_needed'; next_action='diagnose route '+rs
state={'bem':'BEM-809','status':status,'route_status':rs,'runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'runtime_completed_at':runtime.get('completed_at'),'response_files':resp[-10:],'dispatch_results':results[-10:],'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem809_execute_bem808_route.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem809_execute_bem808_route.md').write_text('# BEM-809 | Execute BEM-808 Route | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem809_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-809'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem809_execute_bem808_route.json','governance/reports/bem809_execute_bem808_route.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem809_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-808 route by checking runtime/response/dispatch state or routing patch path')
